title: pi-corp v0.8 — What's Next
description: Pick the next improvements. I've ranked them by impact.

questions.question: Company name for the demo (replaces 'EganAI' in examples)
What should v0.8 focus on?
options: Real execution loop — /corp-heartbeat spawns agents via interactive_shell dispatch, records results
GitHub Issues sync — pull issues into tickets, push status back as comments
Cost tracking — parse pi/claude JSONL transcripts for actual token/cost per run
HTML dashboard — visual org chart, kanban, cost charts in browser
Workspace isolation — each ticket gets its own git worktree (Symphony pattern)
Marketing tool wiring — Marketer calls real APIs (Resend email, Twitter, Vercel deploy)
recommended: Real execution loop — /corp-heartbeat spawns agents via interactive_shell dispatch, records results
Cost tracking — parse pi/claude JSONL transcripts for actual token/cost per run

questions.question: Publish pi-corp as an npm package so anyone can install it?
